personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Data Quality & Analytics Enablement

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience across data pipelines, database platforms, data quality, analytics enablement, and production support. Strong background building Python/SQL ETL workflows, validating large datasets, documenting data flows, and supporting decision-ready reporting in regulated financial-services environments. Experienced translating stakeholder and analytic requirements into reliable data assets for forecasting, dashboards, and downstream modeling while maintaining strong controls, governance, and operational reliability.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints into governed reporting datasets used for capacity analytics, executive visibility, and operational decision support.
Built validation, reconciliation, and data quality routines to improve completeness, consistency, and trust in recurring analytics outputs across infrastructure and application telemetry sources.
Translated stakeholder forecasting and reporting requirements into structured data models, Oracle schemas, technical documentation, and repeatable data preparation workflows for downstream analytics.
Developed ML-ready datasets and forecasting workflows using Python, PySpark, Prophet, and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks months ahead and support planning decisions.
Integrated monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA APM, and AppDynamics into unified operational reporting, supporting incident analysis, trend reporting, and root-cause investigation.
Migrated data and forecasting workloads toward AWS patterns using S3, Glue, Redshift, and ECS/EC2 concepts while maintaining operational support, documentation, and reliable delivery cycles.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring data for critical hospitality systems, converting telemetry into actionable operational insights for engineering teams.
Led the FAST project by mining real-user and synthetic performance datasets to identify optimization opportunities, reliability patterns, and data-backed improvement recommendations.
Implemented end-user monitoring and transaction tracing practices that improved visibility into service behavior, data quality of telemetry, and operational troubleshooting workflows.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial-services client, managing enterprise monitoring environments with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, replacing manual exports and improving the repeatability of operational data collection.
Designed dashboards, alerts, thresholds, runbooks, and technical documentation adopted by support and engineering teams for ongoing operational visibility.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving data integrity and sub-second query performance.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation tooling to test migration correctness across millions of transaction records, supporting phased cutover and post-migration confidence.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows for legacy-to-modern platform migration, emphasizing reconciliation, performance, and operational readiness.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Java, C++, Perl, Korn Shell, JSON, XML

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting and analytics platform that transformed infrastructure telemetry into ML-ready datasets, dashboard outputs, and planning insights for senior stakeholders.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, and Bedrock concepts to support governed data processing, analytics, and AI-assisted querying.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic Python automation pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered scoring, JSON quality gates, and application tracking, demonstrating RAG-style retrieval and production-minded workflow controls.
